The Page of Sacrifices 🤍

With all my heart…

Shivanshi, the way you've stood with me is something words can never fully capture. From waking up for hours just to be there for me, to supporting me in every possible moment, you've shown what true love really means. Your care, your pampering, your efforts in the smallest things like that birthday card… everything speaks of a love that is pure and endless. Every hug, every kiss carries warmth that heals and strengthens me. You didn't just love me — you gave your everything without hesitation. And that's what makes you irreplaceable.

Ishaannnn lovesss youuuuu soo soo muchh myy Shivanshiii myyy yaarrraa ❤️
